title: Elemental Tools
description:
A fun mod that adds tools with special abilities for each element.
Fire, earth, water and air
body:
# Elemental Tools

**Version: 1.0.3**
**Minecraft Version: 1.20.x-1.21.x**

**All Right Reserved**

## Overview

Welcome to the world of **Elemental Tools**, a remarkable Minecraft mod that introduces a captivating twist to your survival adventures. Are you tired of the same old routine of mining, crafting, and battling with the same generic tools and weapons? Seek no further, for this mod unlocks a realm of elemental power, imbuing your gameplay with exciting new possibilities.

## Features

- **Flame Axe:** Crafted with the fiery essence of Blaze Powder, the Flame Axe is a lumberjack's dream. It not only slices through wood with unparalleled efficiency but also brings the power of fire to your fingertips. Need to clear a dense forest or create a formidable trap? The Flame Axe's ability to set blocks ablaze will be your go-to choice.

- **Aqua Pickaxe:** Dive into the depths of your world with the Aqua Pickaxe, an extraordinary tool constructed from Prismarine Shards. Not only does it mine underwater blocks at an astonishing speed, but it also provides a precious bubble of air when held. This invaluable feature allows you to explore aquatic realms with newfound ease and confidence.

- **Terra Shovel:** The Terra Shovel is a nature lover's best friend. Crafted from Emeralds and leaves, this tool has a unique ability to not only unearth blocks with unrivaled efficiency but also acts as a hoe. No need to make a hoe; the Terra Shovel will do it for you, ensuring your farm thrives with life.

- **Aero Sword:** For the valiant adventurers who love a good sword fight, the Aero Sword, constructed from feathers, brings an added flair to your combat encounters. This blade possesses the power to knock back your foes with each strike, granting you precious moments to strategize. Additionally, it allows you to glide gracefully, making it an indispensable tool for traversing challenging terrains.

## Elemental Table

Introducing the **Elemental Table**, the heart of this mod's crafting system. This mystical table, crafted from precious emeralds and gleaming gold, serves as the hub for creating your elemental tools. Use it to combine elemental items and essential materials, harnessing the power of the elements to craft the tools that will shape your adventures.

To craft the Elemental Table, you will need to combine emeralds and gold in a crafting table. Once you've crafted it, place it in your world, and it will become the focal point for your elemental crafting journey.

## Crafting Recipes

We've taken care to provide crafting recipes that are not only balanced but also encourage creativity and experimentation. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or a budding Minecraft enthusiast, these recipes will fit seamlessly into your existing gameplay, adding a new layer of depth and excitement.

Access these recipes at our wiki http://eletools.quackstudios.dev

## Why Choose Elemental Tools?

**Elemental Tools** is not just another mod; it's an invitation to explore the game you love from a fresh perspective. It caters to various playstyles, offering players the freedom to choose the tool that best suits their needs. Whether you're a miner, a farmer, a builder, or a daring explorer, this mod has something for you.

## Get Ready to Unleash Elemental Power

Dive into the enchanting world of **Elemental Tools** and discover the wonders that elemental mastery can bring to your Minecraft experience. Whether you're lighting up the night with the Flame Axe or delving into the deep with the Aqua Pickaxe, these tools will revolutionize your adventure. Unleash your inner mage, craftsman, and warrior today by installing **Elemental Tools**. Your journey is about to get a whole lot more exciting!
